item.name: Illuminati Taut Gobtwine
item.description: An alchemical thread woven in the dark laboratoriums of the Illuminati. Some of the realm's more daring weavers have applied the unnaturally pliable substance to a variety of vestments and found that it heightens the attributes of eikon-inspired equipment. However, advances in crafting technology have rendered it obsolete.

obj.n: Alexander - The Arm of the Son (Savage)
